title: Prohibit Remote Activation of Collaborative Computing Devices
description: Prohibit remote activation of collaborative computing devices and provide indication of use to users present at the device.

checks.name: Camera Access Restricted via GPO
checks.purpose: Verify LetAppsAccessCamera = 2 (Force Deny) in the AppPrivacy GPO registry, preventing applications from remotely activating the camera

checks.name: Microphone Access Restricted via GPO
checks.purpose: Verify LetAppsAccessMicrophone = 2 (Force Deny) in the AppPrivacy GPO registry, preventing applications from remotely activating the microphone

checks.name: Policy Prohibiting Remote Activation of Collaborative Devices
checks.purpose: Verify organizational policy prohibits remote activation of cameras, microphones, and other collaborative devices — policy review only

checks.name: Camera Access Restricted via GPO
checks.purpose: Verify LetAppsAccessCamera = 2 on the server to restrict camera access

checks.name: Microphone Access Restricted via GPO
checks.purpose: Verify LetAppsAccessMicrophone = 2 on the server to restrict microphone access

checks.name: Policy Prohibiting Remote Activation of Collaborative Devices
checks.purpose: Verify organizational policy prohibits remote activation of collaborative computing devices — policy review only

checks.name: Camera Devices Not World-Accessible
checks.purpose: Verify /dev/video* devices are not world-readable or world-writable, preventing unauthorized remote applications from accessing the camera

checks.name: Audio Capture Devices Not World-Accessible
checks.purpose: Verify /dev/snd/* devices are not world-accessible, preventing unauthorized processes from remotely activating the microphone

checks.name: Policy Prohibiting Remote Activation of Collaborative Devices
checks.purpose: Verify organizational policy prohibits remote activation of cameras and microphones — policy review only

checks.name: Camera Devices Not World-Accessible
checks.purpose: Verify /dev/video* devices are not world-readable or world-writable, preventing unauthorized remote applications from accessing the camera

checks.name: Audio Capture Devices Not World-Accessible
checks.purpose: Verify /dev/snd/* devices are not world-accessible, preventing unauthorized processes from remotely activating the microphone

checks.name: Policy Prohibiting Remote Activation of Collaborative Devices
checks.purpose: Verify organizational policy prohibits remote activation of cameras and microphones — policy review only

remediation: Configure GPO settings under Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Windows Components > App Privacy to Force Deny camera and microphone access (LetAppsAccessCamera and LetAppsAccessMicrophone = 2). On Linux, use udev rules to restrict /dev/video* and /dev/snd/* device permissions to the video/audio group only.
